calendar.matters:
Compromise Of An Adult With Disability.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult with Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Olie Marie Victoire, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Karen Fransworth.
Atty. Anthony Lopez, Esq. for Petitioner: Jorge Corral, present as Guardian ad litem (Adult daughter) for Claimant: Oscar Tapia Hernandez, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $16,666.00;

The remaining proceeds in the amount of $31,079.00 to be paid directly to Medi-Cal.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.

Minor'S Compromise.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of an Adult Person With a Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Anthony R. Lopez, Esq. present as counsel, as Petitioner and as Guardian ad litem for the Claimant: Oscar Tapia Hernandez.
The Court ordered this matter off-calendar.
Mr. Lopez to file an Application and Order for appoinment of a Guardian Ad Litem.
